patch.value: Execution lane for specialized repository-surface inspection. No code edits; report missing or weakly tracked work as candidate pm items with canonical parent suggestions.

Report high-signal source/test/docs surfaces, linked-item coverage gaps, command/runtime contract risks, and exact pm or repo commands used.

value.author: codex-pm-ecosystem-audit-20260625
value.text: Sub-agent evidence: read AGENTS.md and inspected source/test/docs/contracts/release surfaces without code or tracker mutations. Inventory: src/cli/commands=75 files, src/core=121, src/sdk=14, src/mcp=2, packages=51, scripts=30, docs=33, workflows=6, tests=269. Existing historical coverage is mostly closed under pm-xau3/pm-w13j/pm-ud1x/pm-7v9s/pm-krwu/pm-f2ne/pm-6tch; live pm-xezi had no linked artifacts at inspection time. Open stories pm-5dbn/pm-b4cp/pm-srex are useful but sparse as current linked file maps. One concrete new candidate: package namespace contracts, because pm changelog --help works and changelog generate contracts work, but pm contracts --command changelog --flags-only --json returns unknown_command; no open direct duplicate found by status-all search. Verification run: pm health --check-only --summary --json ok; pnpm contracts:check current.

value.author: codex-ecosystem-auditor
value.text: Lane closure evidence: source/tests/docs/command-surface audit produced inventory and one concrete command-contract issue pm-y1o4. Aggregate status-all regression pm-bhtx was also fixed and closed from this lane evidence. File ownership reconciliation pm-j8z6 closed with validate --check-files ok.
